verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A cooler breeze dances through the cornfield tall and strong And summer's rhythm fades with autumn's song A pile of childhood memories surround like fallen leaves And the smell of pumpkin pie, my senses seize

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's the season of thanksgiving When all the family's meeting And the only warmth is by the lights of home Where the field is ripe and ready Awaiting the gathering We count the many blessings we have known Where heart and Heaven rhyme Harvest time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can feel the changes, the breeze against my soul The evening shadows make me long to go A familiar voice is calling, my Father's arms await What a perfect way to end the weary day
